title: age-group — HTTP routes
description: Tenant-facing age-group CRUD + lifecycle actions (set-default, archive, restore) + hypothetical resolver endpoint that answers 'which age group does this DOB + sport_key fall into?'. Platform-admin cross-tenant read.

groups.name: tenant-age-groups
groups.description: Admin-facing AgeGroup CRUD scoped to the active tenant. Every tenant member can READ (age groups are UI reference data every enrollment + roster form needs); WRITE gated by age_groups.create / update / delete permissions + the age_group_custom entitlement (Small tier locked to seeded catalog).

routes.description: filter[organization_id], filter[sport_key], filter[status], filter[is_default], filter[is_seeded], filter[is_youth], filter[gender_category], filter[min_age_lte], filter[max_age_gte], sort[]=sort_order,name,created_at,min_age_inclusive. Default sort: sort_order asc, name asc. include=inbound_reference_count.

Admin-triggered creation. Body: { name (required), slug, sport_key, organization_id, description, min_age_inclusive (required), max_age_inclusive (required), cutoff_date_kind (default: calendar_year), cutoff_month, cutoff_day, gender_category (default: any), is_default, sort_order, color }. Consumes 1 `age_group_slot` entitlement (is_seeded is always false from tenant callers — reserved for the platform seeder). Refused with AGE_GROUP_CUSTOM_DISABLED on Small tier.
Full AgeGroup row. include=inbound_reference_count for the reference-count aggregate. include=eligibility_preview for a set of sample DOBs the caller can verify against.

Update mutable fields. Body: { name, slug, description, color, gender_category, sort_order }. Bounds edits require age_groups.update.bounds. Cutoff edits require age_groups.update.cutoff. Sport-key edits require age_groups.update.sport_key + age_group_sport_specific entitlement. organization_id + tenant_id + is_seeded are immutable. is_youth is auto-derived + read-only.

Soft-delete (transitions to archived + fires AgeGroupArchived). Refused with 409 CANNOT_DELETE_DEFAULT_AGE_GROUP when is_default=true. Refused with 409 CANNOT_DELETE_SEEDED_AGE_GROUP when is_seeded=true. Refused with 409 AGE_GROUP_IN_USE when Team.age_group_id or EventDivision.age_group_id references. Hard-delete via PurgeArchivedAgeGroupsJob after retention window (1095 days).

Flip is_default=true within the AgeGroup's (tenant, organization, sport_key) tuple (auto-demotes the previous default in same transaction). Fires AgeGroupDefaultChanged. Body may be empty. Refused when AgeGroup is archived.
Alias for DELETE — soft-archives + fires AgeGroupArchived. Body: { reason }. Same refusals as DELETE.

Un-archive (clears deleted_at). Only within the 1095-day retention window. Refused when restoration would create a duplicate default (AGE_GROUP_DEFAULT_DUPLICATE_ON_RESTORE) or duplicate slug (AGE_GROUP_SLUG_DUPLICATE_ON_RESTORE) in the scoping tuple.

Hypothetical resolver. Query: dob=YYYY-MM-DD (required), sport_key (nullable — falls back to generic groups), on_date=YYYY-MM-DD (default today), organization_id (nullable — falls back to tenant-wide groups). Returns the matching AgeGroup row + the CutoffDateCalculator's computed effective age + the resolution trace (which groups were candidates + why one won). Multiple matches (indeterminate) return 422 AGE_GROUP_RESOLVE_INDETERMINATE with the candidate list.

groups.name: platform-age-groups
groups.description: Cross-tenant read for support tooling. Writes stay on the tenant surface — platform ops must impersonate an admin to write.

routes.description: Cross-tenant filterable list. filter[tenant_id], filter[sport_key], filter[status], filter[is_default], filter[is_seeded].
